evidence: DB has section heading 'II' appended to end of [¶4] paragraph text. PDF shows 'II' as a separate centered section heading on its own line. DB heading sequence is [I, III, IV, V]; PDF correctly has [I, II, III, IV, V]. Normalized text comparison confirms this is the only substantive error when quotes/whitespace are normalized.
note: The section heading 'II' is incorrectly joined to the end of the [¶4] paragraph with '. II' rather than being on a separate line. This is a paragraph_seq (heading sequence) error where a structural element has been absorbed into preceding content.
